message:
Simplify GitHub Actions validation workflow

- Remove unnecessary jq installation (pre-installed on ubuntu-latest)
- Remove chmod (script already has executable bit in git)
- Remove redundant job name (workflow name suffices)
- Add workflow_dispatch for manual triggering

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,22 +7,15 @@ on:
   pull_request:
     branches:
       - main
+  workflow_dispatch:
 
 jobs:
   validate:
-    name: Validate Plugins
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout repository
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
-      - name: Install jq
-        run: |
-          sudo apt-get update
-          sudo apt-get install -y jq
-
       - name: Run validation
-        run: |
-          chmod +x scripts/validate-plugins.sh
-          ./scripts/validate-plugins.sh
+        run: ./scripts/validate-plugins.sh
